_comment: Curated per-year play counts read manually from the SoundCloud Insights 'All Platforms' dashboard (one bar per year; value taken from each bar's tooltip) on 2026-06-13 (refreshed from the live dashboard; first captured 2026-05-29). This is the AUTHORITATIVE historical spine for the /stats 'Play Count History' chart; the live recent detail (2026-05-08 onward) comes from data/history.csv. Each platform's annual values sum exactly to its all-time total (SoundCloud 28586, Spotify 19742, Apple Music 4108). SoundCloud has data since 2016, but 2016-2022 is small and lumped into the '2022' entry (1032 = cumulative plays through end of 2022). Spotify and Apple Music insights only exist since 2023. stats.astro turns annual_plays into cumulative year-end points for completed years.
source: SoundCloud Insights — All Platforms · All Time · per-year (PLAYS)
